content.en:
After Xuanyun Great Ancestor entered the sixth layer of the Ruins Stone Tower, he did not have any conflict with Xinghai Great Ancestor and them, and he also walked to the stone steps step by step.

But in the end, he only got to Ye Tian's position, and he couldn't move on.

After all, he hadn't deliberately improved his immeasurable will before, and it was the first time he had come here, so the level of immeasurable will was about the same as Ye Tian now.

In fact, not only him, but many third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms were thinking about how to condense immeasurable blood, so naturally they would not spend time and resources to improve immeasurable will.

At the third stage of the high-level immeasurable lifeform level, a little increase in immeasurable will will will not increase strength, unless the immeasurable will produces a qualitative change.

But it was so difficult to change qualitatively, so those high-level immeasurable lifeforms gave up for the time being.

If every high-level immeasurable lifeform was doing their best to improve their immeasurable will, there would definitely be a third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform that had reached the top of the six hundred stone steps and successfully entered the seventh layer.

But now, there are no such high-level immeasurable life forms.

As time passed, Ye Tian walked up one stone step at a time on the sixth floor of the Ruins Stone Tower, and he could walk up a few steps every time he progressed.

In the outside world, Ye Tian is also quickly using the resources in his hands to condense the immeasurable bone, refine the immeasurable bone, and cultivate the immeasurable body of Taihao.

Hailou Tianjin can assist in the cultivation of Taihao Immeasurable Body, and he still has enough Hailou Heavenly Gold in his hand, which is enough to cultivate Taihao Immeasurable Body to the realm of Xiaocheng.

But even the Taihao Immeasurable Body of the Xiaocheng Realm is far beyond the Infinite Body of the Consummation Realm.

The Mahayana immeasurable body is far from being comparable to the superior immeasurable body, and the gap is really too big!

And if he really lacks resources, Ye Tian will find a way to trade with some forces, such as the Remnant Heaven Pavilion and other forces, to trade the resources he needs, and then fuse them into more advanced resources.

In this way, Ye Tian condensed more and more immeasurable bones, and Taihao's immeasurable body was also making rapid progress.

And after a long time, Ye Tian was still limited by his cultivation, and his immeasurable will began to progress slowly, unable to keep up with the progress of the Star Sea Great Ancestor and the Foxy Blood Great Ancestor.

After all, they were already third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and it was easier to improve their immeasurable will.

The limit of the immeasurable will of the second-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms is naturally not as high as that of the third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

When he enters the third stage, it will be easier to improve the immeasurable will.

this day.

Ye Tian suddenly found that an outsider had come to the sixth floor of the Ruins Stone Tower.

This outsider was definitely not a high-level immeasurable lifeform in the Xuanqi Realm, but a heaven and earth outside the Xuanqi Realm like him.

At this moment, this outsider was shrouded in black robes, and his aura was covered, as if there was no heaven and earth.

However, many Great Ancestors could still sense the slightest breath of this outsider, and thus deduce something.

"Ghost Shadow Ancestor of the Outer Realm Alliance, I didn't expect you to come too!"

Xinghai Great Ancestor snorted coldly.

Obviously, he was very unhappy with the Outside Alliance and this Ghost Shadow Great Ancestor, and it could be seen from the tone of his voice.

"Xinghai Great Ancestor, long time no see!"

The Ghost Shadow Ancestor greeted.

However, the Xinghai Great Ancestor did not continue to pay attention to this Ghost Shadow Great Ancestor.

"Ghost Shadow Ancestor!"

Ye Tian didn't know this Great Ancestor, but he had also seen the immeasurable blood list, and the Ghost Shadow Great Ancestor was in the twenty-sixth place, perhaps inferior to the Xinghai Great Ancestor.

However, the list can only be used as a reference, and at their level, there is a gap in ranking, which does not mean that there is a big gap in strength.

"What is the Out-of-bounds Alliance?"

Ye Tian was a little curious.

Immediately, his other replica bodies went to investigate, and it didn't take long to find the Outworld Alliance.

The Outside Alliance is strictly an alliance of outsiders, which was very weak a long time ago, but now this alliance is getting stronger and stronger, but after the power is strong, it also becomes complicated, that is, it is not united.

At present, the Outside Alliance is roughly divided into six factions, each faction is like a faction, and the factions seem to be one force, but in fact they are no longer one.

And the Ghost Shadow Great Ancestor is very famous, he is the Great Ancestor of the Void Sect of the Outside Alliance.

The Outside Alliance of overall strength is now stronger than the Xuanqi Pavilion, but a single faction is not as strong as the Xuanqi Pavilion.

The Xuanqi Pavilion is a real force, and it is extremely ancient, so the cohesion is not comparable to the Outside Alliance.

In addition, the foundation of the Outside Alliance is not in the Xuanqi Territory, so it is impossible for them to fight hard.

If the Outside Alliance fought against a force like Xuanqi Pavilion, the Outside Alliance would definitely be broken up and flee, and no Great Ancestor would really do his best for the outside Alliance.

"I didn't expect outsiders to establish such a big force in the Xuanqi Territory. Could it be that the Overlord of the Void Whale also regards me as the Great Ancestor of a certain faction of the Outer Alliance!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

It was precisely because of this jealousy that the Void Whale Overlord did not dare to have any thoughts about him.

After all, the Void Whale Overlord is like an ant in the eyes of a force like the Outside Alliance, and it is not worth mentioning at all.

"According to the information obtained, the foundation of the Outside Alliance is not in the Xuanqi Territory, and they can even withdraw at any time, so the major forces in the Xuanqi Territory do not know much about the hidden strength of the Outside Alliance. Even the Great Ancestors between the Outside Alliance factions didn't necessarily know each other. Some of the Great Ancestors of the Outer Realm Alliance were cultivated outside the Xuanqi Realm, so I can completely pretend to be the Great Ancestor of the Outer Alliance!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

This time, he was going to let the real body copy enter the Ruined Stone Tower, and he felt that there were definitely good things on the seventh, eighth, and ninth floors of the Ruined Stone Tower.

And the ninth layer is the core, the connection point between the Xuanqi Realm and the Shenjia Realm.

And there are nine other layers of the ruins stone tower, and now it has broken into the Shenjia realm, which is considered the area of the Shenjia realm, and in the case of the ruins, it is estimated that it will be a pure resource world after the tenth layer.

If it is used to develop power, after occupying the Ruined Stone Tower, the tenth to eighteenth floors can be used to cultivate members, or become the residence of the Great Ancestors.

Moreover, the ninth layer over there is not snooped on by the Xuanqi Realm, which is most suitable for developing members, and it is extremely hidden.

"After the True Body Replica Body has grown up, go to the Ruins Stone Tower! The immeasurable will of the True Body Replicating Body is even more refined and powerful, and the potential of the physical body far exceeds that of the Xuanming Great Ancestor's Replica Body, even if it is used to break through the sixth layer, it is much faster than the Xuanming Great Ancestor. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

And just like that, another period of time passed.
